indexes.name: api_keys_prefix_unique
indexes.definition: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX api_keys_prefix_unique ON public.api_keys USING btree (key_prefix)

indexes.name: idx_api_keys_expires
indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_api_keys_expires ON public.api_keys USING btree (expires_at) WHERE (expires_at IS NOT NULL)

indexes.name: idx_api_keys_prefix
indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_api_keys_prefix ON public.api_keys USING btree (key_prefix) WHERE ((record_state)::text = 'active'::text)

indexes.name: idx_api_keys_service_account
indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_api_keys_service_account ON public.api_keys USING btree (parent_service_account_id)

indexes.name: idx_event_outbox_correlation
indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_event_outbox_correlation ON public.event_outbox USING btree (correlation_id)

indexes.name: idx_event_outbox_pending
indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_event_outbox_pending ON public.event_outbox USING btree (scheduled_for, priority DESC, created_at) WHERE (status = 'PENDING'::text)

indexes.name: idx_event_outbox_type
indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_event_outbox_type ON public.event_outbox USING btree (event_type, status)

indexes.name: idx_groups_creator
indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_groups_creator ON public.groups USING btree (creator_principal_id)

indexes.name: idx_groups_record_state
indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_groups_record_state ON public.groups USING btree (record_state, created_at DESC)

indexes.name: idx_groups_slug
indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_groups_slug ON public.groups USING btree (slug)

indexes.name: idx_invitations_expires
indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_invitations_expires ON public.invitations USING btree (expires_at) WHERE ((invitation_status)::text = 'pending'::text)

indexes.name: idx_invitations_identifier
indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_invitations_identifier ON public.invitations USING btree (identifier, invitation_status)

indexes.name: idx_invitations_invited_by
indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_invitations_invited_by ON public.invitations USING btree (invited_by)

indexes.name: idx_invitations_record_state
indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_invitations_record_state ON public.invitations USING btree (record_state, created_at DESC)

indexes.name: idx_invitations_resource
indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_invitations_resource ON public.invitations USING btree (resource_type, resource_id, invitation_status)

indexes.name: idx_invitations_token
indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_invitations_token ON public.invitations USING btree (token_hash)

indexes.name: idx_invitations_unique_pending
indexes.definition: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_invitations_unique_pending ON public.invitations USING btree (resource_type, resource_id, identifier, relation) WHERE (((invitation_status)::text = 'pending'::text) AND ((record_state)::text = 'active'::text))

indexes.name: invitations_token_hash_key
indexes.definition: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX invitations_token_hash_key ON public.invitations USING btree (token_hash)

constraints.name: invitations_status_check
constraints.definition: CHECK (((invitation_status)::text = ANY ((ARRAY['pending'::character varying, 'accepted'::character varying, 'declined'::character varying, 'cancelled'::character varying, 'expired'::character varying])::text[])))

indexes.name: idx_oauth_accounts_provider
indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_oauth_accounts_provider ON public.oauth_accounts USING btree (provider)

indexes.name: idx_oauth_accounts_provider_email
indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_oauth_accounts_provider_email ON public.oauth_accounts USING btree (provider_email)

indexes.name: idx_oauth_accounts_user_id
indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_oauth_accounts_user_id ON public.oauth_accounts USING btree (parent_user_id)

indexes.name: oauth_accounts_provider_unique
indexes.definition: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX oauth_accounts_provider_unique ON public.oauth_accounts USING btree (provider, provider_user_id)

indexes.name: idx_rebac_relationship_metadata_gin
indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_rebac_relationship_metadata_gin ON public.rebac_relationship_metadata USING gin (metadata)

indexes.name: idx_rebac_rel_group_member
indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_rebac_rel_group_member ON public.rebac_relationships USING btree (resource_type, relation, subject_type) WHERE ((relation)::text = 'member'::text)

indexes.name: idx_rebac_rel_resource
indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_rebac_rel_resource ON public.rebac_relationships USING btree (resource_type, resource_id)

indexes.name: idx_rebac_rel_subject
indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_rebac_rel_subject ON public.rebac_relationships USING btree (subject_type, subject_id)

indexes.name: idx_rebac_rel_type_relation
indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_rebac_rel_type_relation ON public.rebac_relationships USING btree (resource_type, relation)

indexes.name: idx_rebac_relationships_unique_subject
indexes.definition: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_rebac_relationships_unique_subject ON public.rebac_relationships USING btree (resource_type, resource_id, subject_type, subject_id, COALESCE(subject_relation, ''::character varying))

indexes.name: idx_rebac_relationships_unique_tuple
indexes.definition: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_rebac_relationships_unique_tuple ON public.rebac_relationships USING btree (resource_type, resource_id, relation, subject_type, subject_id, COALESCE(subject_relation, ''::character varying))

indexes.name: idx_security_events_created_at
indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_security_events_created_at ON public.security_events USING btree (created_at)

indexes.name: idx_security_events_email_failures
indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_security_events_email_failures ON public.security_events USING btree (((event_details ->> 'email'::text)), created_at) WHERE (((event_type)::text = 'login'::text) AND ((event_status)::text = 'failure'::text))

indexes.name: idx_security_events_ip_failures
indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_security_events_ip_failures ON public.security_events USING btree (ip_address, created_at) WHERE (((event_type)::text = 'login'::text) AND ((event_status)::text = 'failure'::text))

indexes.name: idx_security_events_status
indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_security_events_status ON public.security_events USING btree (event_status)

indexes.name: idx_security_events_type
indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_security_events_type ON public.security_events USING btree (event_type)

indexes.name: idx_security_events_user_id
indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_security_events_user_id ON public.security_events USING btree (user_id)

indexes.name: idx_service_accounts_creator
indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_service_accounts_creator ON public.service_accounts USING btree (creator_principal_id)

indexes.name: idx_service_accounts_record_state
indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_service_accounts_record_state ON public.service_accounts USING btree (record_state, created_at DESC)

indexes.name: idx_sessions_expires
indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_sessions_expires ON public.sessions USING btree (expires_at)

indexes.name: idx_sessions_token
indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_sessions_token ON public.sessions USING btree (session_token_hash)

indexes.name: idx_sessions_user
indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_sessions_user ON public.sessions USING btree (parent_user_id)

indexes.name: idx_tenants_creator
indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_tenants_creator ON public.tenants USING btree (creator_principal_id)

indexes.name: idx_tenants_record_state
indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_tenants_record_state ON public.tenants USING btree (record_state, created_at DESC)

indexes.name: idx_tenants_slug
indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_tenants_slug ON public.tenants USING btree (slug)

indexes.name: tenants_slug_key
indexes.definition: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX tenants_slug_key ON public.tenants USING btree (slug)

indexes.name: idx_users_email
indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_users_email ON public.users USING btree (email)

indexes.name: idx_users_record_state
indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_users_record_state ON public.users USING btree (record_state, created_at DESC)

indexes.name: users_email_key
indexes.definition: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX users_email_key ON public.users USING btree (email)

indexes.name: idx_verification_codes_expires
indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_verification_codes_expires ON public.verification_codes USING btree (expires_at)

indexes.name: idx_verification_codes_lookup
indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_verification_codes_lookup ON public.verification_codes USING btree (identifier, purpose)

indexes.name: unique_active_code
indexes.definition: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX unique_active_code ON public.verification_codes USING btree (identifier, purpose)

indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_verification_tokens_expires ON public.verification_tokens USING btree (expires_at)

indexes.name: idx_verification_tokens_hash
indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_verification_tokens_hash ON public.verification_tokens USING btree (token_hash)

indexes.name: idx_verification_tokens_identifier
indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_verification_tokens_identifier ON public.verification_tokens USING btree (identifier)

indexes.name: idx_verification_tokens_purpose
indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_verification_tokens_purpose ON public.verification_tokens USING btree (purpose)

indexes.name: verification_tokens_token_hash_key
indexes.definition: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX verification_tokens_token_hash_key ON public.verification_tokens USING btree (token_hash)
